expectations.text: Explains Tailwind v4's CSS-first configuration change (moving away from tailwind.config.ts)
expectations.evidence: Explains CSS-first configuration, @theme directive replacing tailwind.config.ts, comparison table.

expectations.text: Provides a concrete fix showing how to define custom colors in v4
expectations.evidence: Shows @theme directive with --color-brand-* variables, @config bridge option, @theme inline option.

notes: Comprehensive answer from training knowledge. Covers three fix options (CSS-first, @config bridge, @theme inline). Includes other breaking changes (content detection, @plugin, border color change). Content appears accurate for v4.
